testFiles.description: Specify glob expressions to the test files to run. Defaults to ["**/*.@(test|spec).@(js|mjs|cjs)", "**/test/**/*.@(js|mjs|cjs)"]

concurrency.description: Run tests concurrently within a single mutant run. The dry run is always serialized so that perTest coverage attribution cannot race; this option only affects mutant runs. Defaults to false.

nodeArgs.description: Additional Node.js arguments to pass when running your test files (e.g. ["--experimental-strip-types"] for TypeScript, or a loader via ["--import", "tsx"]). Defaults to [].
